title: ornithoxanthum luteum
intro: Ornithoxanthum luteum, also known as Yellow Bird's Eye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with colds and flu, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic and antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, Ornithoxanthum luteum can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
